content.text:
```mdl
@ OISAIR PROJECT – TWO‑WAY CONFIDENTIALITY AND NON‑DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_3_nda_5

open std.collections

/* ----------------------------------------------------------------------
   Domain model – parties, representatives and confidential information
   ---------------------------------------------------------------------- */

@ Parties (the two contracting entities)
type Party = {
    name: string,
    is_disclosing: bool,   -- true for the Disclosing Party
    is_receiving: bool    -- true for the Receiving Party
}

@ Representatives of a party (employees, advisors, etc.)
type Representative = {
    party: Party,                                 -- the party the person belongs to
    is_employee: bool,                            -- true for employees, false for other reps
    needs_access_for_permitted_purpose: bool,    -- true if the rep must know the info to fulfil the purpose
    aware_of_terms: bool                          -- true if the rep has been told the NDA terms
}

@ Confidential information that is the subject of the agreement
type ConfidentialInfo = {
    is_confidential: bool,   -- true for information that falls under the definition
    content: string,         -- opaque payload (not used in the model)
    owner: Party              -- the Disclosing Party
}

/* ----------------------------------------------------------------------
   Model entities – one instance of each domain object
   ---------------------------------------------------------------------- */

entity disclosing_party: Party
entity receiving_party: Party
entity confidential_info: ConfidentialInfo
entity representative: Representative

/* ----------------------------------------------------------------------
   Helper functions
   ---------------------------------------------------------------------- */

@ Returns true when a representative is allowed to receive confidential info
func can_share_to_rep(rep: Representative) -> bool:
    rep.is_employee and
    rep.needs_access_for_permitted_purpose and
    rep.aware_of_terms

/* ----------------------------------------------------------------------
   Normative rules – derived from the clauses of the NDA
   ---------------------------------------------------------------------- */

@ Clause 3 – General confidentiality and non‑use obligations
rule O take_reasonable_measures:
    receiving_party.is_receiving always

rule O not_disclose_to_third_party:
    not (
        confidential_info.is_confidential and
        representative.party = receiving_party and
        not can_share_to_rep(representative)
    ) always

rule O not_use_outside_permitted_purpose:
    not (
        confidential_info.is_confidential and
        receiving_party.is_receiving and
        not representative.needs_access_for_permitted_purpose
    ) always

@ Clause 4 – Disclosure to representatives (employees, advisors, …)
@ Permission: sharing with an employee that satisfies the NDA conditions
rule P share_with_employee:
    confidential_info.is_confidential and
    representative.party = receiving_party and
    can_share_to_rep(representative) always

@ Prohibition: sharing with a person that does **not** satisfy the conditions
rule F share_with_non_employee:
    confidential_info.is_confidential and
    representative.party = receiving_party and
    not can_share_to_rep(representative) always

@ Clause 5 – Return or destruction of confidential information
rule O return_or_destroy_after_termination:
    (termination_date now) implies eventually (confidential_info.is_confidential = false)

@ Clause 10 – Survival of confidentiality obligations after termination
rule O confidentiality_survives_three_years:
    (confidential_info.is_confidential and disclosure_date now) implies
    eventually (confidential_info.is_confidential = false) within 3 years

@ Clause 8 – Injunction on breach (prohibition of breach without court order)
rule F breach_without_injunction:
    (confidential_info.is_confidential and
     receiving_party.is_receiving and
     not can_share_to_rep(representative)) always
```
